message:
Implement MiniLM text encoder and IVF vector search

- Add all-MiniLM-L6-v2 BERT encoder in Zig WASM (384-dim embeddings)
- Implement custom IVF partition index for efficient vector search
- Load ivf_partitions.bin for partition-to-row mapping via HTTP range requests
- Remove brute force fallback - require proper IVF index
- Search ~73K rows (7%) instead of 1M with nprobe=20
- Parallel fragment search with controlled concurrency (4 fragments, 6 batches)
- UI: Text model selector shown by default, CLIP hidden unless image mode
